program: Business English — Desbloqueio para Lideranca em Oncologia
hub_subtitle: Desbloqueio Comunicativo para Liderança em Oncologia Internacional

lesson.menu_desc: Telling the story of 24 years at the hospital -- 31 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 -- Your Career Journey -- From Finance to Leading Oncology
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernando Varela | Aula 2 -- Your Career Journey

listenings.text: Hi, my name is Marcos, and I work with Fernando. Let me tell you about my career. I joined the hospital in 2008. I started as a junior analyst in the finance department. After three years, I got my first promotion. Then I became a project coordinator. Five years ago, I moved to the research team. Now I have a lot of experience in clinical projects. My background is in economics, like Fernando. It was a long journey, but a great one.

Hi Fernando, this is Sarah. I am preparing the agenda for our strategic meeting. I want to introduce you to our American partners. Can you send me a short summary of your career? Please tell me when you joined the hospital, your background, and your main promotions. Two or three lines are enough. Our partners want to know your experience in oncology. Thank you, and talk soon.
